about.bio: Passionate software engineer with 5+ years building scalable web applications. I specialize in full-stack development and enjoy turning complex problems into clean, efficient solutions.

experience.description: Leading development of enterprise-scale web applications using React and Node.js. Architected a microservices migration that reduced latency by 35%.
Developed and maintained multiple client projects using modern web technologies. Delivered 20+ features across a SaaS platform with 10,000+ active users.
Specialized in building responsive, accessible web interfaces. Improved Core Web Vitals scores by 40% across all client sites.

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce solution with real-time inventory management, payment processing, and a headless CMS for product content.

projects.name: Task Management System
projects.description: Collaborative task management platform with real-time updates, role-based access control, and team workspaces.

projects.name: AI Content Generator
projects.description: AI-powered content generation tool using GPT-4 to produce marketing copy, blog drafts, and product descriptions at scale.

projects.name: Real-time Chat App
projects.description: End-to-end encrypted chat application with user authentication, file sharing, and persistent message history.
